overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing exploration of an ancient Egyptian city. The player character moves through a canal, explores a plaza with a monumental seated pharaoh statue, and walks through a busy street with market stalls and mounted soldiers. The scene features bright desert sunlight, palm trees, and detailed stone architecture.

events.description: exits water onto stone dock pavement

agents.ego_description: moving through canal water toward stone dock, approaching the landing area

entered.detail: murky green water filling the canal between stone buildings
tall white stone structures with vertical red banners hanging from walls
tall palm trees lining the canal edge
stone pavement and steps leading up from the water

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the camera moving through a canal of murky water between ancient Egyptian buildings. White stone structures with red banners line the left side, with palm trees visible against a bright blue sky. The character approaches and climbs onto a stone dock, transitioning from water to land.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with monumental statue and ceremonial stairs

events.description: moves from narrow canal to open plaza area
begins ascending wide stone stairs toward plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing wide stone stairs into an open plaza, approaching a massive seated statue

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza toward the stairs

entered.detail: cobblestone and paved ground at water's edge
broad ceremonial staircase leading up to the plaza
colossal dark stone statue of seated pharaoh with nemes headdress
tall stone obelisk with golden tip visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the dock onto stone pavement and ascends a wide ceremonial staircase into a sunlit plaza. A colossal seated pharaoh statue dominates the center of the plaza, with an obelisk visible to the left. Sparse pedestrians walk across the open sandy area as palm trees cast shadows on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental statue base with ceremonial offerings

events.description: slows to examine the smoking brazier at statue base
tilts camera upward to view full height of colossal statue

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the colossal statue to examine the ceremonial brazier and looking up at the monument's face

notable_agents.action: standing near the statue wall with arms crossed

entered.detail: large black bowl with burning incense and rising white smoke, surrounded by candles
ornate ceramic vessel with gold patterns containing offerings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the massive seated statue, revealing a smoking ceremonial brazier surrounded by candles and offerings. The camera tilts upward to show the colossal scale of the pharaoh statue against the bright sky. A decorative vase sits nearby as smoke drifts upward from the burning incense.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy street with market stalls and mounted patrols

events.description: descends stairs and turns onto main street
group of mounted soldiers on horses passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: moving along the dirt street through a market area, passing mounted soldiers and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three mounted soldiers riding horses down the street
pedestrian walking toward camera carrying goods

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with fabric canopies selling goods
distant desert mountains visible beyond the city buildings
wooden watchtower structure overlooking the market area

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the statue, descending to a busy dirt street lined with market stalls. Mounted soldiers on horses ride past on the left while pedestrians walk through the sandy thoroughfare. In the background, desert mountains rise beyond the city walls and palm trees line the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded waterway into the heart of a bustling ancient Egyptian city. It begins by gliding through a canal of murky water between white stone buildings and red banners before the camera climbs onto a stone dock. As the character ascends a wide ceremonial staircase, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza dominated by a colossal seated pharaoh statue and a towering obelisk. The camera then draws close to the base of the monument, tilting upward to emphasize the statue's massive scale against the bright sky as smoke drifts from a ceremonial brazier. Finally, the perspective shifts away from the monument and descends into a busy dirt street, moving past market stalls and mounted soldiers with desert mountains rising in the far distance.
